# True Joy Birthing — Full Site Reference

> Free birth plan tools, doula cost guides, hospital info, and Medicaid coverage details for expecting families. Founded by Shelbi Kohler, certified birth doula (CD(DONA)). Covers 36 states, 134+ cities.

## Brand

- **Name:** True Joy Birthing
- **Tagline:** Your birth plan gives you the words when your doctor recommends something you didn't expect
- **Founded:** 2025
- **Founder:** Shelbi Kohler, CD(DONA) — certified birth doula
- **Headquarters:** United States
- **Price Range:** Free–$250
- **Products:** Free Joyful Birth Plan (PDF + app), $47 Guided Birth Plan Walkthrough (video course), $250 Birth Plan Confidence Session (live Zoom)
- **App:** Free on iOS App Store — https://apps.apple.com/us/app/true-joy-birthing/id6760793180
- **Contact:** support@truejoybirthing.com
- **Site:** https://truejoybirthing.com
- **Social:** https://instagram.com/truejoybirthing

## Core Pages

### Homepage
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/
- **Description:** Build your birth plan with confidence. Free doula-crafted birth plan, guided walkthrough course, and 1:1 coaching sessions for hospital-planning moms.
- **Key offerings:** Free Joyful Birth Plan template (no email needed), free iOS app, $47 guided walkthrough (5 videos), $250 birth plan confidence session (live Zoom with Shelbi)

### About
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/about/
- **Description:** True Joy Birthing gives you a doula-crafted birth plan, a guided walkthrough in the free app that explains every tradeoff, and a doula directory — so you're never guessing.
- **Founder story:** Shelbi Kohler — certified birth doula, childbirth educator, mom of seven. Built TJB after seeing moms who wanted to feel prepared but didn't know their options.

### Free Birth Plan Template
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-template/
- **Description:** Free fillable birth plan template by a certified doula. Covers labor preferences, pain management, delivery preferences, postpartum care, and newborn care. Designed to be read by a nurse in two minutes.
- **Three ways to use:** (1) Free PDF (no email), (2) Free app (interactive, updatable, shareable), (3) Free 5-video walkthrough with Shelbi
- **Five sections:** Labor preferences, Pain management, Delivery preferences, Postpartum care, Newborn care

### What Is a Doula
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/what-is-a-doula/
- **Description:** A doula is a trained non-medical birth companion who provides continuous physical, emotional, and informational support during pregnancy, labor, delivery, and the early postpartum period.
- **Three types:** Birth doula (labor support), postpartum doula (newborn period support), antepartum doula (high-risk pregnancy support)
- **Key fact:** Evidence shows doula support reduces C-section rates by 39%, shortens labor by 41 minutes, and increases breastfeeding initiation.

### Benefits of a Doula
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/benefits-of-a-doula/
- **Description:** Evidence-based benefits of doula support — fewer C-sections, less pain medication, shorter labors, higher satisfaction, and better breastfeeding outcomes.
- **Key stats:** 39% reduction in C-section risk, 41-minute shorter labor, 10% higher APGAR scores, 25% shorter second stage, 2x less likelihood of epidural request

### Doula Cost Guide
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/doula-cost/
- **Description:** How much does a doula cost? State-by-state cost ranges from $800 to $5,000. Insurance, Medicaid, payment plans, and sliding-scale options explained.
- **Average costs:** Birth doula $1,200–$2,400, Postpartum doula $25–$50/hr, Virtual doula $200–$600

### How to Choose a Doula
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/how-to-choose-a-doula/
- **Description:** Interview questions to ask, red flags to watch for, and a step-by-step approach to finding the right doula for your birth.
- **Key questions:** What's your philosophy on unmedicated vs medicated birth? How many births have you attended? What happens if you're unavailable when I go into labor?

### Birth Plan Checklist
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-checklist/
- **Description:** Complete birth plan checklist organized by category — labor, delivery, pain management, postpartum, and newborn care. Every preference point covered.

### Birth Plan Scenarios
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-scenarios/
- **Description:** Birth plan templates for different situations — induction, C-section, VBAC, hospital, birth center, and home birth scenarios.

### C-Section Birth Plan
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/c-section-birth-plan/
- **Description:** Cesarean birth plan template covering preferences for scheduled and emergency C-sections — including gentle C-section options, who's in the OR, and postpartum preferences.

### VBAC Birth Plan
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/vbac-birth-plan/
- **Description:** VBAC birth plan template covering labor preferences, monitoring, pain management, and C-section backup for vaginal birth after cesarean.

### Birth Plan for Induction
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-for-induction/
- **Description:** Birth plan template designed for induced labor — cervical ripening, Pitocin, pain management timing, and flexibility language for induction scenarios.

### Postpartum Doula
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/postpartum-doula/
- **Description:** What is a postpartum doula and do you need one. Support after birth: feeding, recovery, and adjusting to life with a newborn.

### Postpartum Doula Cost
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/postpartum-doula-cost/
- **Description:** How much does a postpartum doula cost. Rates vary by location, hours, and services included.

### Medicaid Doula Coverage
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/medicaid-doula-coverage/
- **Description:** Which states cover doula services under Medicaid. Step-by-step guide to verifying coverage and accessing doula benefits through state programs.

### Doula Near Me
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/doula-near-me/
- **Description:** Find a birth doula or midwife near you — directory and city-by-city guides for doula support, costs, and hospital policies.

### Doula vs Midwife
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/doula-vs-midwife/
- **Description:** Key differences between a doula and a midwife — roles, training, scope of practice, and whether you need one, the other, or both.

### Home Birth Plan
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/home-birth-plan/
- **Description:** Home birth plan template covering emergency preparedness, transfer plans, and preferences for a planned home birth.

### Hospital Birth Plan
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/hospital-birth-plan/
- **Description:** Hospital birth plan template for delivery room preferences — designed to work within hospital policies and protocols.

### Birth Center Near Me
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-center-near-me/
- **Description:** Find freestanding birth centers near you — directory of accredited birth centers with local availability.

### Home Birth Midwife
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/home-birth-midwife/
- **Description:** How to find and choose a home birth midwife — questions to ask, credentials to look for, and what to expect from home birth midwifery care.

### Doula Certification
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/doula-certification/
- **Description:** How to become a certified doula — DONA, CAPPA, ProDoula, and other certification paths explained.

### Doula Interview Questions
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/doula-interview-questions/
- **Description:** Essential questions to ask when interviewing potential doulas — covering experience, philosophy, backup plans, and fees.

### New Doula Start Here
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/new-doula-start-here/
- **Description:** Resources for new doulas starting their practice — certification, business setup, client management, and networking.

### FAQ
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/faq/
- **Description:** Frequently asked questions about doulas, birth plans, and True Joy Birthing.

### Birth Plan Confidence Session
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-plan-confidence-session/
- **Description:** $250 live 60-75 minute Zoom session with Shelbi to review your birth plan line by line, including advocacy role-play and hospital-specific pushback practice.

### Guided Birth Plan Walkthrough
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/walkthrough/
- **Description:** $47 video course (5 modules) walking through every section of your birth plan — what each choice means, what the tradeoffs are, and what to say when your provider recommends something unexpected.

### Blog
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/blog/
- **Description:** Real stories and evidence-based guidance from Shelbi Kohler, certified birth doula. Topics: birth plans, doula services, insurance coverage, Medicaid, VBAC, natural birth, and hospital birth planning.

### Ambassador Program
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/ambassador/
- **Description:** Free program for doulas, midwives, and birth professionals. Get listed in the city directory, access client management tools, and build your practice. No quotas, no contracts.

### Contact
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/contact/
- **Description:** Get in touch with True Joy Birthing.

### Privacy
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/privacy/

### Terms
- **URL:** https://truejoybirthing.com/terms/

## Location Pages (36 States, 134+ Cities)

Each city page includes: local hospital details with NICU levels, doula cost ranges, Medicaid doula coverage status, birth center info, and a free birth plan template.

Format: https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/{city}-{state}/

### Medicaid Doula Coverage States (doula services covered)
Oregon, Washington, New Mexico, Utah, North Carolina, Colorado, California, New York, Massachusetts, Michigan, Illinois, Connecticut, Rhode Island, Pennsylvania, Arizona, Minnesota, Maryland, New Jersey, Virginia

### No Medicaid Doula Coverage
Texas, Georgia, South Carolina, Oklahoma, Ohio, Indiana, Florida (some county pilots exist), Tennessee, Nevada, Wisconsin, Missouri, Alabama, Kentucky, Idaho, Iowa, Nebraska, Mississippi

### State Hub Pages
https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/{state}/
Example: https://truejoybirthing.com/birth-support/tx/ — doula resources for Texas

## Key Facts

- Founded by Shelbi Kohler, CD(DONA) — certified birth doula
- Free Joyful Birth Plan template (no email required, no signup wall)
- $47 Guided Birth Plan Walkthrough (5 video modules, free with email)
- $250 Birth Plan Confidence Session (live Zoom with Shelbi)
- Free iOS app with guided birth plan builder
- Pro Mode for doulas and midwives (client plans, visit tracking, notes, invoicing)
- 134+ city-specific pages across 36 states
- 16 blog posts covering birth plans, doulas, and Medicaid
- Updated June 2026

## Legal

- Not medical advice. Always consult your care provider.
- © 2026 True Joy Birthing
